subcodes.first_line: God willing, through divine providence, may ye be illumined by the effulgences of the Sun of Truth. This is a Day wherein [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انشاء الله بعنایت الهی از انوار تجلیات شمس حقیقت منور باشید امروز روزیست که
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @spiritual transformation, @suffering and imprisonment
